code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of food‑related triples into a single fluent sentence.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Fast predicate-to-phrasing mapping
    predicate_phrasing = {
        "country": lambda s, o: f"{s} is from {o}",
        "ingredient": lambda s, o: f"{s} contains {o}",
        "region": lambda s, o: f"{s} originates from {o}",
        "division": lambda s, o: f"{s} belongs to the division {o}",
        "family": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in the family {o}",
        "order": lambda s, o: f"{s} is classified under the order {o}",
        "course": lambda s, o: f"{s} is served as a {o}",
        "dishVariation": lambda s, o: f"{s} has variations such as {o}",
        "mainIngredient": lambda s, o: f"The main ingredients of {s} are {o}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"The leader of {s} is {o}",
        "alternativeName": lambda s, o: f"{s} is also known as {o}",
        "creatorOfDish": lambda s, o: f"{s} was created by {o}",
        "creator": lambda s, o: f"{s} was created by {o}",
        "servingTemperature": lambda s, o: f"{s} is served {o}",
        "served": lambda s, o: f"{s} is served {o}",
        "carbohydrate": lambda s, o: f"{s} contains {o} of carbohydrates",
        "fat": lambda s, o: f"{s} contains {o} of fat",
        "protein": lambda s, o: f"{s} contains {o} of protein",
        "year": lambda s, o: f"{s} was introduced in {o}",
        "related": lambda s, o: f"{s} is related to {o}",
        "similarDish": lambda s, o: f"{s} is similar to {o}",
        "genus": lambda s, o: f"{s} belongs to the genus {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"The language of {s} is {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"{s} is part of {o}",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"The currency of {s} is {o}",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f"The demonym for {s} is {o}",
        "capital": lambda s, o: f"The capital of {s} is {o}",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda s, o: f"The ethnic group of {s} is {o}",
        "foundationPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was founded in {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"The official language of {s} is {o}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda s, o: f"The leader title of {s} is {o}",
        "servingSize": lambda s, o: f"The serving size of {s} is {o}",
    }

    clauses = []
    for t in triples:
        s, p, o = t.subject, t.predicate, t.object
        # Use dictionary lookup with fallback
        phrasing_func = predicate_phrasing.get(p)
        if phrasing_func:
            clauses.append(phrasing_func(s, o))
        else:
            # Fallback generic phrasing
            clauses.append(f"{s} {p} {o}")

    # Assemble a single sentence
    if len(clauses) == 1:
        sentence = clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
